prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年中山大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4880名、4568名、4260名、4662名、4467名，整体在4260–4880区间内波动，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次约4467名，近两年（2024–2025）波动幅度约200名；该校在上海市综合类招生计划：2021–2024年均为38人，2025年增至39人；2026年计划41人，较2025年扩招约5.1%，扩招对竞争有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第11–13名（2026年第13名），属全国顶尖高校行列，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端、学校管理及校园安全类事件（11件中7件负面），可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度评价为"较热"，总排名第29位，关注度中等。历史投档异常方面，2022年多省出现断档（中关注），2023年投档线大幅下降（低关注），2024–2025年关注度中等，但上海本地未见明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，中山大学拥有23个A-及以上学科，包括生态学A+、工商管理A+、临床医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、数学A等，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、临床医学、电子信息/通信为高热推荐，法学为推荐，新闻传播为明显劝退；中山大学在沪招生专业覆盖上述热门方向。上海市2026年考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35%，竞争显著加剧；中山大学校本部位于广东省广州市，非上海本地高校；在上海招生人数较少（近年约38–41人），属跨省招生，本地考生无地域保护优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次4467名，2026年计划扩招约5.1%经供需弹性计算后主值约4604名；但2026年上海考生总数大幅增加约35%，竞争加剧是推动位次后移的最关键因素，同时声誉偏负面有轻微抑制作用。经有限修正后预测最低录取位次约4654名，波动区间4154–5154名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（无色盲、色弱）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、统计学）
- 人工智能
- 电子信息类（含通信工程、微电子等）
- 法学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 汉语言文学
- 工商管理（管理学、计算机双学士学位）
- 金融学（金融学、AI双学士学位）
- 经济学
- 网络空间安全。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 新闻传播学类（含新闻学、传播学）
- 哲学（拔尖计划）
- 新能源科学与工程
- 遥感科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4154–5154名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次优于区间下限（<4154名），可重点冲刺临床医学、数学类、人工智能等一档王牌专业；若位次接近区间上限（约5154名），应以三档专业保底并争取二档。中山大学学科实力均衡，A类学科覆盖文理医工，考生可根据个人兴趣和选科要求灵活选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Sun Yat-sen University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 4880, 4568, 4260, 4662, and 4467, fluctuating within the range of 4260–4880 without a clear unilateral trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4467, with a fluctuation range of about 200 in the past two years (2024–2025); the enrollment plan for Sun Yat-sen University in Shanghai's comprehensive category: 38 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 39 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 41 students, an expansion of about 5.1% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 11th–13th in recent years (13th in 2026), belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide, with sustained appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct, school management, and campus safety incidents (7 out of 11 negative), which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity evaluation is 'relatively hot', ranking 29th overall, with moderate attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there were gaps in multiple provinces in 2022 (medium attention), a significant drop in admission scores in 2023 (low attention), and moderate attention in 2024–2025, but no obvious gaps were recorded in Shanghai; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Sun Yat-sen University has 23 A- and above disciplines, including Ecology A+, Business Administration A+, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mathematics A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended, Law is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; Sun Yat-sen University's enrollment in Shanghai covers the above popular directions. The total number of candidates in Shanghai for 2026 is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% compared to 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Sun Yat-sen University's main campus is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, not a local university in Shanghai; the number of enrollments in Shanghai is small (about 38–41 in recent years), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no regional protection advantage for local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the baseline ranking for 2025 is 4467, and the 2026 plan expansion of about 5.1% results in a main value of about 4604 after supply-demand elasticity calculation; however, the significant increase of about 35% in the total number of Shanghai candidates in 2026 is the most critical factor pushing the ranking backward, while the slightly negative reputation has a slight inhibitory effect. After limited correction, the predicted minimum admission ranking is about 4654, with a fluctuation range of 4154–5154.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (no color blindness, color weakness)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information (including Communication Engineering, Microelectronics, etc.)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Business Administration (Management, Computer Science dual degree)
- Finance (Finance, AI dual degree)
- Economics
- Cyberspace Security.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Journalism and Communication (including Journalism, Communication)
- Philosophy (Top Talent Program)
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- Remote Sensing Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4154–5154, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<4154), you can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors such as Clinical Medicine, Mathematics, and Artificial Intelligence; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (about 5154), you should use Tier 3 majors as safety and strive for Tier 2. Sun Yat-sen University has balanced disciplinary strength, with A-class disciplines covering arts, sciences, medicine, and engineering. Candidates can choose flexibly based on personal interests and subject requirements.
